items.name_en: In stock 💥 Gradient color 🇫🇷🇫🇷🇫🇷 39*42*8cm/3261; Small 35*37*7cm/3260 🆕 New Chanel Black-Silver Gradient! 22 Shopping Bag. Continues the classic quilted pattern and leather chain shoulder strap design. The appearance is simple and focuses on practical functions. The interior has a zip pocket and a removable small bag fixed by spring hooks. The opening is designed with a magnetic snap and a drawstring elastic band, presenting a lazy and casual style. A hollowed-out CHANEL double-C pendant adds a finishing touch. Made of soft and durable original oil-wax leather. The only high-end hardware in the market, the touch is truly invincible, and it is visibly spacious [Okay], it is too suitable as a mom bag, fitness enthusiasts can buy Dimensions:

items.name_cn:
Chanel 23p Square
Size: 12.5x16x4.5(cm)
23p Enamel Heart Square is amazing. This is a soft, delicate lambskin little cutie. The look is especially beautiful. Pink two-tone hearts, double C logo, and gem-shaped enamel decorations adorn the bag strap. ~ The combination of the enamel clasp and strap makes the Square adaptable to a wider range of styles. Even a plain shirt can make the whole outfit look striking. It is indeed a dream item for many sisters.
Style No. AS3782

items.name_cn:
Chanel 23 Autumn/Winter Camellia CF
Size: 20cm Full Set
The 23 Autumn/Winter runway collection centers on the Camellia, one of the brand's classic elements. The various postures of the camellia are pushed to the extreme this season. There are complex flower beds formed by sequin embroidery stacking, as well as camellias embellished on the handbag. Even the small polka dots on the tweed and the light feather decorations appear to be camellias.

Chanel 23 Autumn/Winter Camellia CF

items.name_cn:
Chanel SS2022 Fall/Winter New Collection
Size: 15.5x25.5x6.5(cm)
22p Fall/Winter New Sparkling Flap Bag, the most beautiful CF of the year ✔️
Black fabric surface inlaid with many square rhinestones ⚪️ Silver sparkling crystal rhinestones bling✨bling, extremely dazzling 👀 Silver rhinestones spliced into a rose 🌹 shape, truly the finishing touch 🐲, instantly elevating the bag's noble quality! Equipped with CF vintage woven metal shoulder strap, small and exquisite ☑️
Uses original fabric and hardware, 1:1 restoration of the authentic look
Multiple carrying styles: Shoulder, Crossbody, Handheld. Suitable for any height, easy to carry 〰️

items.name_en: Chanel SS2023 Pre-Fall Slot Machine Collection, Authentic Style
items.name_cn:
Chanel SS2023 Pre-Fall Slot Machine Collection, Authentic Style
Size: 9x16x4(cm)
23c Pre-Fall Resort Collection Preview
The most anticipated is the slot machine collector series mini bag from the show, which didn't disappoint in person. Quite exquisite and substantial. As shown in the photo, pressing the pearl clasp on top reveals decent capacity. It can't fit a standard iPhone, but it can fit an iPhone 4 size. It's perfectly fine for carrying other odds and ends like confidence, beauty, and elegance.

items.name_en: In stock 22P Black Nylon MAX Bowling Bag 🎳
items.name_cn:
In stock 22P Black Nylon MAX Bowling Bag 🎳
A different kind of Chanel, expected to start a new fashion trend!
Previously, aside from the denim series which could be used simply and roughly, other Chanel bags basically required us to treat them gently~ This year's nylon series finally allows us to maintain Chanel's elegant and calm core while fulfilling the bag's mission as a storage item!
This is a big size version of a small lunch box, but the curvature of the bag is rounder, and it comes with a small card holder, so it can be considered a mother-daughter bag
Carried by hand or on the shoulder, it gives off a cool and chic vibe
The bigger, the more fashionable, truly a golden rule~
(Size: 25×46×28cm) 99150

items.name_cn:
Chanel 23p CF Sequin Bag
Size: 20(cm)
23p Limited new classic CF sequin bag In stock
Sequin, shiny ✨ Sequin, a focal point 🤩🤩
This bag is simply a combination of all Chanel classic elements
Chain bag, double C logo, love at first sight!💘 When I saw it for the first time, I always miss him ❤️
Can be carried by hand, crossbody, on the side, or on the shoulder
Simply a perfect versatile bag! 😄 Soft and comfortable to the touch, love it
Beautiful explosion~ The crossbody length is okay, and it can also be carried by hand
Super beautiful, temperament score is full
The whole bag also has a certain thickness

items.name_cn:
Chanel 23A Atelier Full Diamond CF
Size: 20(cm)
Collector's crystal flap bag
This is the most beautiful pearl CF of the season ✔️
Velvet surface inlaid with many crystal pearls of various sizes ⚪️
Plus sparkling crystal sequins, bling✨bling, making it exceptionally dazzling 👀
Mini double C logo inlaid in the pearl quilted pattern, truly the finishing touch 🐲
Instantly elevates the entire bag's noble quality! With the vintage woven metal chain strap, it is small and exquisite ☑️
Uses original fabric and hardware, 1:1 restored to the look of a ZP
Multiple carrying styles: can be worn as a backpack, shoulder bag, or handbag. Suitable for any height, easy to carry 〰️
